invariants.statement: No critical state exists only in conversation; authority, intent, decisions, evidence, and history live in versioned files.
invariants.rationale: A new contributor or agent must be able to recover project state without a prior conversation.
invariants.escalation: If a task would leave load-bearing state only in chat, stop and record it as a durable file first.

invariants.statement: A completed work item has zero pending acceptance criteria.
invariants.rationale: Completion must mean the declared outcome was actually reached.
invariants.escalation: Move the item back to active or waive the criterion with rationale; never relabel.

invariants.statement: A satisfied acceptance criterion has linked evidence.
invariants.rationale: Confidence is not evidence; completion requires proof.
invariants.escalation: Produce an evidence run and link it, or set the criterion to pending or waived.

invariants.statement: Completed work is never rewritten to make history appear cleaner.
invariants.rationale: Rejected alternatives and failures are assets; laundering them destroys recoverability.
invariants.escalation: Add a new record (work item, decision, or evidence) that supersedes; do not edit closed history.

invariants.statement: The deepest applicable AGENTS.md refines its parents but cannot weaken them.
invariants.rationale: Authority is local, but local authority cannot escape repository-wide guarantees.
invariants.escalation: A change that needs to weaken a parent contract requires operator approval and a decision record.

invariants.statement: Changes to the declared frozen surface require explicit human operator approval.
invariants.rationale: Some paths and symbols are load-bearing; silent edits to them cause disproportionate damage.
invariants.escalation: Flag the intended change, name the protected entry, and obtain operator sign-off before implementing.

invariants.statement: Derived artifacts are generated from source records, never hand-edited as if they were sources.
invariants.rationale: Hand-maintained mirrors of derivable state rot faster than humans can reconcile them.
invariants.escalation: Regenerate the artifact; if it cannot be derived, promote its inputs to a source record instead.
